lvgl.version=9.1.0
lvgl.tag=v9.1.0
lvgl.commit=e1c0b21b2723d391b885de4b2ee5cc997eccca91
platform=host_macos
display_backend=sdl2
input_backend=sdl2
toolchain=Apple clang version 21.0.0 (clang-2100.0.123.102)
arch=arm64
sdl2.version=2.32.10
sdl2.cflags=-I/opt/homebrew/include/SDL2 -D_THREAD_SAFE
sdl2.libs=-L/opt/homebrew/lib -lSDL2
render_mode=direct
renderer=accelerated
frame_period_ms=16
demo_widgets=enabled
local_assets=enabled
filesystem=stdio:A
image_decoders=lodepng,tjpgd,bmp
font_loader=tiny_ttf_file
lv_conf_hash=9e9b8cf9d4808f1402c6a599806289127e9f515ed73c6d011178c6b0bc45a7b5
lib_hash=344fecfdfc4524f8702d0e77777733776abca536dfdee5693eab0d98d61c177c
